title: aftersans53228's fabric road
description: This a minecraft road mod running on fabric.
body:
Mod introduction

This is a minecraft road mod running on fabric,it can help players build a huge road traffic network in the game.

Some reminders

If there are a few errors with this mod or if you would like to make some suggestions about it, you can report it to the issue on github. This mod has not yet added any survival mode recipes,so you must get blocks in creative mode. The minecraft version 1.16.5 is only compatible with this mod version "1.0.0-beta-build4" and below, if you want to play the updated mod content,please update to the minecraft version 1.17 and above to be compatible with this mod version "1.0.0-Release" or above.

List of mod content types

Note: The road tool is placed at the bottom of the Tools card bar.

Normal Road Block

This type of block is a pavement foundation block or a road facility located on a pavement.

Normal Road Sticker

This type of square is a reticulate line, an indicator arrow, and other types of ground signs placed on a pavement.

Road Decoration

This type of block is a road facility that is placed everywhere, such as road separation zones, traffic lights, etc.
